answer: \boxed{Frank is furious at Laura because she is revealed to be a mole working for the opposing lawyer, Ed Concannon, secretly providing confidential information about their case to the defense. His betrayal feels like a personal and professional stab in the back, especially after he has already suffered immense personal and professional failures. The violent outburst—hitting her—symbolizes his shattered trust and desperation to protect his last chance at redemption.}
